description: The placeholder rows in the participant table disappear, indicating a change in the page's loading state.
frame_description: Close-up of the participant table headers and empty rows.

description: User clicks on the browser address bar, highlighting the URL. Simultaneously, the 'All participants' sidebar becomes visible on the page.
The page reloads or navigates, resulting in a blank screen and a change in the tab title to 'Askable'.
A yellow banner appears at the top of the page stating that the study is currently in review.
